issue_title: Some icons are missing! They show up as blanks; most notably all the Atlassian logos are missing
issue_body_preview:
Uh oh, tiny issue... Some icons are missing! They show up as blanks; most notably all the Atlassian logos are missing. I confirmed that the svg's were present in the `drawio` source folder; but the logos are refusing to show up. Any idea?

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/3169104
test_description_zh: 在 VS Code 中打开 drawio 编辑器，从图形库中搜索并拖入 Atlassian 系列图标（如 Jira、Confluence、Trello 等 Atlassian 品牌 logo），观察这些图标在画布上的显示情况。同时检查其他图标库中的图标是否也能正常渲染。
expected_result_zh: 所有 Atlassian 系列图标及其他图标库中的图标应正常显示在画布上，图标内容清晰可见，不应出现空白、缺失或不可见的情况。
